name: Two-in-One Dressing: Garlic Vinaigrette and Creamy Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 medium garlic clove, peeled and cut into thirds
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk vinegar, broth, sugar, salt, and pepper in a bowl to mix.
2. Gradually whisk in olive oil until blended.
3. Pour 1 cup of the mixture into a blender.
4. Pour the remaining dressing through a funnel into a narrow-necked bottle.
5. Thread garlic onto a toothpick and add it to the bottle (the pick keeps the garlic contained when pouring).
6. Cover and refrigerate.
7. When ready to use, shake the bottle well.
8. Add cheese, mayonnaise, and sour cream to the blender and process until smooth.
9. Pour into a jar with a tight-fitting lid and refrigerate.
